title: Permissible clauses in contracts
doc_html:
§1580.  Permissible clauses in contracts

A contract may also contain any other clause not in conflict with this Chapter or other provisions of law.  

Added by Acts 1982, No. 808, §1.

§1580.  Permissible clauses in contracts
A contract may also contain any other clause not in conflict with this Chapter or other provisions of law.
Added by Acts 1982, No. 808, §1.
